title: Oven Mate, Oven Cleaning Kit
features: Professional Oven Care: Elevate your oven cleaning routine with our comprehensive kit, designed for both efficiency and excellence in maintaining a sparkling, grease-free oven.
Powerful Grease Removal: Our specially formulated cleaner effortlessly cuts through stubborn grease, ensuring a deep clean that restores your oven's pristine condition without harsh scrubbing

Time-Saving Solution: Experience the convenience of a swift and effective cleaning process. Unlock the secret to a spotless oven without the hassle—ADD TO BASKET now for a cleaner, more efficient kitchen

Versatile Application: Suitable for various oven types, this kit provides a universal solution for all your oven cleaning needs. Enjoy the flexibility of a cleaner that adapts to your kitchen appliances
Long-Lasting Brilliance: Preserve the cleanliness and shine of your oven with our premium cleaning kit. Invest in lasting brilliance and maintain a hygienic cooking environment effortlessly
description: From the manufacturer ABOUT US Oven Mate and House Mate products are developed to solve kitchen and household cleaning challenges using innovative thinking. The Just For Racks Cleaning Kit includes bags for the racks and a unique formulation to cut through grease and burnt on grime. The Oven Mate Oven Cleaning Kit contains low odour gel, brush and gloves.
